group_1.textLeft: What is it, Yakumo?

group_1.textRight: Where are you right now?

group_1.textLeft: Home. Why do you ask?

group_1.textRight: Could you come to the park on the ground floor?@I'll meet you there.
...Is something wrong?

group_1.textLeft: Well, you see...

group_1.textRight: I was surprised to hear the news from Togame@myself...
Never did I imagine that that girl's name@would come up here...
Mikoto Sena...

group_1.textLeft: Yes... I was also told that Alina had regained her@memories,
and now the two of them are working towards@destruction together...
Perhaps my wish had something to do with this...

group_1.textRight: How can you be so sure?

group_1.textLeft: Remember a while back, when I was investigating@Magical Girls' disappearances...
...after I'd learned that we were destined@to become Witches?
I had been researching Mikoto Sena after@you told me about her.
And then I stumbled across her diary...
Written in it were heartbreaking curses...
...about her miserable circumstances,
and her regrets for having dug herself into an@irreversible situation with her wish...

group_1.textRight: Is that the past that the Mirror Witch...
Or rather, that Mikoto Sena was burdened by?
A miserable monster, born from an unfortunate@upbringing...
Tales like that are all too familiar to those of us@born in Daito.

group_1.textLeft: Anyway, her entries were cut short@halfway through...

group_1.textRight: As expected.@She did become the Mirror Witch.

group_1.textLeft: But the date she suddenly stopped on...
...happens to be the day I made my wish.

group_1.textRight: [chara:101601:effect_emotion_surprise_0][se:7226_shock]...?!

group_1.textLeft: "I want to be the one to destroy Kamihama."
Maybe that was what caused Mikoto Sena@to become the Mirror Witch.

group_1.textRight: Don't jump to conclusions.
She would have turned into a Witch that day@regardless...
And her diary still would have contained those@same regrets about her wish.
Besides, you wished to become the destroyer@yourself.
So long as you don't act on that,@you won't hurt the city.

group_1.textLeft: You're right, Kanagi.

group_1.textRight: Then why are you treating this situation@so gravely...?

group_1.textLeft: Because there was a time when I acted@to ruin things myself.

group_1.textRight: ...When was that?

group_1.textLeft: The moment I made a contract.
That in itself was an act of destruction.
Without lifting a finger, everything was set@in motion towards devastation.
The terms of my wish were fulfilled when I made it.

group_1.textRight: And what of Mikage's contract?
She made hers after learning about yours,@didn't she?
"To protect Kamihama", I believe.

group_1.textLeft: Yes, her wish did come true.
It miraculously protected Kamihama from Eve and@Walpurgisnacht,
which means its effect has been used up,@and my wish still remains.

group_1.textRight: Wouldn't her wish have cancelled yours out?

group_1.textLeft: Kyubey's ability to make wishes come true@is the one thing I'm sure of.
I had a faint hope that perhaps mine wouldn't@be granted,
but my heart shattered when I heard about@Endless Mirrors...
Whether I live or die, my wish is bound to come@to pass eventually.
I should know that— after all, I've glimpsed into@so many others at the Coordinator's Shop.
